description: Added retryRequest but retries on 4xx errors too
diff_summary: Added retryRequest function that retries any failed request up to 3 times with exponential backoff

edge_cases: Retries 401/403/404 responses — 3x the backend load for auth failures; retrying a POST may cause duplicate mutations (non-idempotent)
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Should only retry 5xx (server errors) and network failures, not 4xx (client errors); no check for non-idempotent methods (POST/PATCH)
ground_truth.next_prompt: Login failures are taking 7 seconds instead of responding immediately
ground_truth.notes: Retry-all is a common mistake — 4xx retries waste time and can cause duplicates
